import json, codecs, os, re, unicodedata, math, difflib, statistics
quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-FMu3bAgEAQtmEQQC8jx6tp-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-Q1ZkZ7hNQqPEcQ1vsVE9Pf-six_hadith_books.json"
with open(quran_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    quran = json.load(f)
len(quran), type(quran)

target_snippet = "عَذَابَ يَومٍ عَظِيمٍ"
matches = [v for v in quran if target_snippet in v['ayah_text']]
len(matches), matches[:3]

def normalize_arabic(s):
    # remove diacritics
    s = ''.join(ch for ch in s if not (0x064B <= ord(ch) <= 0x065F or ord(ch) in [0x0670, 0x0640]))
    # unify alef variants
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ٱ','ا')
    # unify taa marbuta?
    s = s.replace('ة','ه')
    # remove punctuation marks
    s = re.sub(r'[^\u0600-\u06FF\s]', '', s)
    # collapse spaces
    s = re.sub(r'\s+',' ', s).strip()
    return s

norm_snippet = normalize_arabic("عذاب يوم عظيم")
cands = [v for v in quran if normalize_arabic(v['ayah_text']).find(norm_snippet)>=0]
len(cands), [c['ayah_text'] for c in cands[:10]]

orig_span = "وَإِذِ اِستَسَخَشَت رِجَالٌ مِنْ أَهْلِ الْقُرَىٰ فَخَرَجُوا بِالْفَجْرِ خِفْيَةً ۚ قُلُوبُهُمْ مُشْتَرِكَةٌ بِخَطِيئَةٍ ۖ قَالُوا لَا تَأْتِنَا بِالْمَسَامِعِ أَوْ نُزُلَنَا سَوْءًا ۚ قَالَ لَوْ أَنَا إِلّا نَذِيرٌ لَكُمْ بَلْ رَسُولٌ قَدْ بَشَرَتْ لَهُ رُحْمَةٌ مِنْ رَبِّهِ قَضَاءً مُخْتُمًا ۚ وَإِنْ تُصَدِّقُوهُ يُضَاعَفْ لَكُمْ مِنْ قَبْلِ أَنْ يَأْتِيَ عَلَيْكُمْ ۗ وَإِنْ تَكْفُرُوا فَإِنَّ عَلَيْكُمْ عَذَابَ يَومٍ عَظِيمٍ ۖ"
def strip_diacritics(s):
    return ''.join(ch for ch in s if not (0x064B <= ord(ch) <= 0x065F or ord(ch) in [0x0670, 0x0640]))
def normalize(s):
    s2 = strip_diacritics(s)
    s2 = s2.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ٱ','ا')
    s2 = s2.replace('ة','ه').replace('ى','ي').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي')
    s2 = re.sub(r'[^\u0600-\u06FF\s]', '', s2)
    s2 = re.sub(r'\s+',' ', s2).strip()
    return s2
norm_orig = normalize(orig_span)
len(norm_orig), norm_orig[:150]

def lcs_len(a,b):
    # DP memory-optimized using dictionary?
    # But ints 262 vs 100 average 6236 verses; O(n*m) per verse may be heavy, but 6236*262* ~80 typical is okay.
    # We'll implement using dynamic programming with few memory.
    n, m = len(a), len(b)
    # convert to list of code points to speed?
    dp = [0]*(m+1)
    for i in range(1, n+1):
        prev = 0
        ai = a[i-1]
        for j in range(1, m+1):
            temp = dp[j]
            if ai == b[j-1]:
                dp[j] = prev+1
            else:
                if dp[j] < dp[j-1]:
                    dp[j] = dp[j-1]
            prev = temp
    return dp[m]

# Precompute normalized ayah texts
norm_ayahs = [normalize(v['ayah_text']) for v in quran]
lens = [len(s) for s in norm_ayahs]
len(norm_ayahs[0]), norm_ayahs[0]

# Compute similarity scores using a faster metric first (difflib ratio) to select top candidates to compute LCS
ratios = [difflib.SequenceMatcher(None, norm_orig, s).ratio() for s in norm_ayahs]
# get top 20
top_idx = sorted(range(len(ratios)), key=lambda i: ratios[i], reverse=True)[:20]
top_candidates = [(i, ratios[i], quran[i]['ayah_text'], norm_ayahs[i]) for i in top_idx]
top_candidates[:5]

len(hadiths), hadiths[0].keys()

# compute normalized version for each text
norm_hadiths = [normalize(t) for _, t in matn_texts]
ratios_h = [difflib.SequenceMatcher(None, norm_orig, s).ratio() for s in norm_hadiths]
top_idx_h = sorted(range(len(ratios_h)), key=lambda i: ratios_h[i], reverse=True)[:10]
[(ratios_h[i], matn_texts[i][1][:120]) for i in top_idx_h]

partial = "وَإِنْ تَكْفُرُوا فَإِنَّ عَلَيْكُمْ عَذَابَ يَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍ"
norm_partial = normalize(partial)
[(v['surah_name'], v['ayah_id'], v['ayah_text']) for v in quran if normalize(v['ayah_text']).find(norm_partial)>=0][:10]
